---
name: Content feedback
about: Flag a gap, an error, or something worth adding to the site
title: ""
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

**What did you notice?**
<!-- A missing concept, an error, something unclear, or a suggestion for new content -->

**Where on the site?**
<!-- A page title, URL, or section — or "general" if it's not tied to a specific page -->

**What would you suggest?**
<!-- What would make it better, or what's missing? No need to be precise — a rough idea is fine -->

**Anything else?**
<!-- Optional: context, a reference, or how you came across this -->
